3331640.name: Tank Frenzy Survivor
3331640.description: Welcome to an all-out, explosive rogue-like survival game where you pilot a tank like no other! Aliens have invaded, and enemy soldiers are gunning for you—your mission? Outlast them all! Dive into a 2D battlefield teeming with relentless waves of aliens and rival armies. As you crush your foes, earn powerful upgrades to turn your tank into an unstoppable war machine, adapting your arsenal with every run. With endless enemies, chaotic battles, and a challenge that grows as fast as you do, the question is: how long can you survive the alien onslaught? Get ready for a test of skill, strategy, and sheer firepower!
